title: We use cookies
description: We use cookies to improve your experience on our website. Some cookies are necessary for the website to function, while others help us understand how you use the site and enable marketing.

essential.title: Essential
essential.description: Essential cookies and services are used to enable the core functionality of the website, such as ensuring the security of the website.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Analytics cookies and services are used to collect statistical information about how visitors interact with a website. These technologies provide insights into website usage, visitor behavior, and website performance to understand and improve the website and enhance user experience.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.description: Marketing cookies and services are used to deliver personalized ads, campaigns, and offers. These technologies enable targeted advertising and marketing campaigns by collecting information about users' interests, preferences, and online activities.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Functional cookies and services are used to offer enhanced and personalized features. These technologies provide additional functionality and improved user experiences, such as remembering your language settings, font sizes, region selections, and customized layouts. If you opt out of these cookies, some services or features on the website may become unavailable.
